name: Quartiles
description: Calculez les quartiles et l'écart interquartile.
seo_title: Calculateur de Quartiles – Q1 Q2 Q3
seo_description: Calculez les quartiles et l'écart interquartile. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Avec options de composition et taxes.
example_label: Calculezte the quartiles Q1, Q2, Q3 and IQR for the dataset.

range_hints.values: Comma-separated numbers: -1e9 to 1e9, minimum 4 values recommended

result_context: Quartiles divide data: Q1={q1}, Q2(median)={q2}, Q3={q3}, IQR={iqr}.
formula_display: Q1 = 25th percentile, Q2 = 50th percentile, Q3 = 75th percentile, IQR = Q3 - Q1
steps: Q1 at position (10-1)×0.25+1 = 3.25: interpolate between and 22
Q2 at position 5.5: average of and 35
Q3 at position (10-1)×0.75+1 = 7.75: interpolate between and 48
mistakes: Using different quartile calculetion methods inconsistently
Not sorting data before calculeting quartiles
